properties.description: This query searches for 5 or more KMIP "Authentication Failure" events originating from the same client IP within a 15 minute window on Utimaco ESKM. This may indicate brute-force or credential-stuffing activity against the KMIP server.
properties.name: Utimaco ESKM - Multiple KMIP authentication failures from same IP
properties.query:
UtimacoESKMKmipServerLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Event == "Authentication Failure"
| where isnotempty(IP)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), EndTime = max(TimeGenerated), Users = make_set(User, 50) by IP
| where FailureCount >= 5
| extend IPCustomEntity = IP
